mdRecord.dcterms:title: Good Evening by Peter Cook and Dudley Moore
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for Good Evening by Peter Cook and Dudley Moore. Directed by William Van Keyser. Scenic Design by Greg Owens. Costume Design by Pamela Hale. Lighting Design by Christopher Green. Stage Manager: Marsha Gitkind. Producing Director: Rex Partington.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
